text:
is a Japanese voice actor who provides the voice for Kensuke Aida in the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Series. He also provides the voice for Keita Asari from the Girlfriend of Steel video game. As of 01 April 2009, he is affiliated with maxmix.

A selection of other roles played by Tetsuya Iwanaga

El Hazard as Makoto Mizuhara

Fortune Quest L (1997) as Trapp

Princess Nine (1998) as Seishirou Natsume

Tsubasa: RESERVoir CHRoNiCLE (2005) as Souseki

Puella Magi Madoka Magica (2011) as Tomohisa Kaname
